title: smallhold token CLI commands (mint, list, revoke)
description: Implement admin CLI commands for token management. 'smallhold token mint <username> --scopes=read,write,follow' generates a bearer token, prints it once (never again), stores SHA-256 hash in DB. 'smallhold token list' shows token metadata without the token value. 'smallhold token revoke <token-id>' sets revoked_at.
design: Token: 64 random bytes, base64url. Store as SHA-256 hex. For CLI-minted tokens, create a synthetic oauth_apps row or use a null app_id. Print token with clear warning: 'This token will not be shown again. Store it securely.'
acceptance_criteria: Minted token works in Authorization: Bearer header; token is only printed once at mint time; list shows app name, scopes, last_used_at, created_at; revoke immediately invalidates the token
